roa.docketEntryComment: Court Orders Bench Warrant Permanently Stayed

/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT/X:CONFLICT ATTORNEY IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CTORD:ACM MODIFIED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO REPORT BY PHONE/X:ORAL REQUEST BY THE DEFENDANT FOR THE COURT TO ALLOW HIM TO HAVE A DOG -DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/PROGPTD:07-13-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL:STATUS OF INFORMAL DIVERSION/CTORD: ACM IS MODIFIED TO CHECK-INS 2X AWEEK IN PERSON AND DEFENDANT TO CONNECT WITH A MENTAL HEALTH FACILITY AT ADIFFERENT PLACE BESIDES WESTSIDE CLINIC/ 16    CPTD PROG RPT/PROGPTD:05-06-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/CTORD: ACM MODIFIED TO CHECK-INS 2 TIMESPER WEEK VIA PHONE ONLY AND DEFENDANT MUST REMAIN WORKING WITH WEST SIDE CLINIC/X: THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO INFORMAL DIVERSION/X: THE CONDITIONS OFTHE DIVERSION ARE, THE DURATION WILL BE FOR 6 MONTHS,THE DEFENDANT MUST NOTPICK UP ANY NEW CHARGES, THE DEFENDANT MUST NOT POSSESS ANY DOGS AND THE DEFENDANT MUST ABIDE BY PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDER/CONTD: STATUS OFINFORMAL DIVERSION/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/CONTD: 11-04-21 PREHEARINGCONFERENCE OR DISPOSITION/DOP/ /CONTD: 11-10-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/CON: SCOTT SUGARMAN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 10-12-21 (60TH)/987,2/ACM/SAORD/SA1: ROBERT ANDREWS/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT IS NOT TO HAVE ANY DOGS IN HISPOSSESSION/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE,09-02-21, D9/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/NP/X: PER BAILIFF, DEFENDANT REFUSED TO COME TO COURT,//X: PD DECLARES A CONFLICT IN THIS MATTER,/BAIL: 40000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DAWT/X: THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/STIPLD: 11-12-21 (60TH)/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DOP/
